name: Greenpill Garden
summary: Season-based public onboarding and stewardship program.
description: Greenpill Garden Season One is a public program thread connecting stewardship, chapters, impact reporting, tools, and the website revamp. The public website should use it as the source-backed onboarding bridge while keeping private pledge and assessment state out of Keystatic.
